ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS TO BE HEARD AT 9:00AM ON LINE 5 OF THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR # 7489

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - THE MOTION THAT MATTERS IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS - SET ONE BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SERVED VERIFIED RESPONSES THAT SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 2033.220 PRIOR TO THE HEARING, AND THUS CCP SECTION 2033.280(C) REQUIRES THE MOTION TO BE DENIED. SECTION 2033.280(C) NEVERTHELESS MAKES SANCTIONS MANDATORY SINCE DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO ANSWER THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS NECESSITATED THE MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S HOURLY RATE OF $225.00 IS REASONABLE AND THAT THE 1.5 HOURS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SPENT IN PREPARING THE MOTION IS ALSO REASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is To be heard at 9:00am on Line 5 of the Discovery Calendar. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489

Plaintiff Cach Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Cach LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions - The motion that matters in Plaintiff's request for admissions - set one be deemed admitted is DENIED. Defendant served verified responses that substantially comply with CCP Section 2033.220 prior to the hearing, and thus CCP Section 2033.280(c) requires the motion to be denied. Section 2033.280(c) nevertheless makes sanctions mandatory since Defendant's failure to answer the requests for admissions necessitated the motion. The court finds that Plaintiff's counsel's hourly rate of $225.00 is reasonable and that the 1.5 hours Plaintiff's counsel spent in preparing the motion is also reasonable. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported. =302/JPT
